title: collinsia latifolia
intro: Collinsia latifolia, also known as Large-flowered Blue Sage or Large-leaved Blue Sage, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the western United States and Canada. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Collinsia latifolia include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. Collinsia latifolia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies to treat various health conditions.
